description: Task (src/task.rs:113-146) has no #[serde(flatten)] extra field. Unknown top-level fields from a future bl version deserialize cleanly (serde ignores unknowns by default) but are DROPPED on next save - serialize_mergeable in src/task_io.rs round-trips through to_value and only emits fields the current struct knows about. external: BTreeMap covers plugin namespaced data, not first-party future fields. Fix: add extra: BTreeMap<String, Value> with #[serde(flatten)] and include its keys in the mergeable writer's sorted key walk. Note struct (src/task.rs:99-104) has the same gap - lower risk because notes live in an append-only sidecar, but apply the same passthrough. Test: extend tests/gates_compat.rs with a future-field round-trip that mutates the task and verifies the unknown field survives.
title: Forward-compat passthrough on Task and Note structs
